THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT JACKSON, CARL L. INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FOOTBALL CLASSIC RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC., A CORPORATION JUDGMENT IS AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF, CHARLES SCHWAB AND FOR THE DEFENDANT CAROL JACKSON, ON LEGAL GROUNDS, BUT FOR THE PLAINTIFF, CHARLES SCHWAB, ON EQUITABLE GROUNDS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF $24,000. THE COURT DECLINES TO IMPOSE INTEREST ON THIS EQUITABLE FORM OF RELIEF, SO LONG AS PAYMENT IS MADE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THIS JUDGMENT - SEE SCANNED DOC
